commitResults.messageTitle: Implemented optional richer card metadata. Cards now support set, rarity, condition, language, and card number, all nullable. Example usage: add /n Charizard /q 1 /p 99.99 /s Base Set /r Holo /c Near Mint /l English /no 4/102 edit 3 /s Jungle /r Rare find /s Base Set /r Rare

commitResults.messageBody: Implemented optional richer card metadata.

commitResults.messageTitle: Add tag/folder support for lightweight categorisation without forcing rigid schema.
commitResults.messageBody:
Cards now carry optional tags, display them when present, and persist them in storage with backward-compatible load support for older save files in Card.java and Storage.java.
The parser now accepts tag add INDEX /t TAG, tag remove INDEX /t TAG, folder ... as an alias, plus /t filters for find and list in Parser.java.
Tag mutations are undoable via the new TagCommand.java, and list/find filtering runs through CardsList.java.
Add tag/folder support for categorisation

commitResults.messageTitle: Added an analytics command for both inventory and wishlist, which shows distinct cards, total quantity, total value, the top 3 most expensive cards, and the top 3 sets by quantity; wishlist analytics does the same thing except on wishlist instead.
